reviews.comment:
Linda estación, prolija y atendida muy bien por playeros serviciales y simpáticos. Tiene todos los combustibles y aceptan pagos electrónicos. En horarios centrales suele haber cola pero la espera no es enorme.

(Translated by Google)
Nice station, well-maintained and very well-run by helpful and friendly attendants. They have all types of fuel and accept electronic payments. There's usually a line during peak hours, but the wait isn't too long.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11264551123214888728/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURnN0llS1NBEAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención de todo el personal tuve la oportunidad de visitar Villa del dique por 30 días y todas las mañanas desayunaba ahí los chicos y chicas atiende de primera además de haber tomado los mejores Cafe.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service from all the staff. I had the opportunity to visit Villa del Dique for 30 days and every morning I had breakfast there. The guys and girls provided excellent service, and I also had the best coffee.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11264551123214888728/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNROTZ1czN3RRAB
